title: Variant will soon be available by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled
body:
Variant will be available by default for workspaces with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security-profile) enabled in July 2026.

Use Variant to ingest semi-structured data from streaming sources (Kinesis, Event Hub), REST APIs, and schemaless databases, while maintaining high-performance query access.

See [Variant type support for Apache Iceberg and Delta Lake](/aws/en/tables/features/variant).

ref_links.text: Variant type support for Apache Iceberg and Delta Lake
